cityDNA.coreFantasy: A brutal but systematic orcish fortress-industrial capital where forge, command, alchemy, shadow trade, and containment become civic order.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Drakmor is not a war camp; it is an institutional war-city where every ember crack, command banner, forge chain, and prison wall belongs to a system.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Drakmor turns aggression, production, secrecy, containment, military rank, alchemical control, and black-market pressure into an established orcish civic machine.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Black basalt, obsidian fortress stone, iron plates, slag brick, forge chains, smoke stacks, ember cracks, blue alchemical glass, red banners, command bastions, black-market arcades, containment keeps, and wet alleys.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: An orcish industrial war civilization that values force, production, command discipline, useful secrecy, containment, and brutal institutional efficiency.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Great forges, ember cracks, war drums, Red Gate, command standards, blue lamps, black-market vaults, and containment yards symbolize aggression made administratively durable.

canonLocks: Drakmor is a vast established orcish fortress-industrial capital, not a temporary war camp.
The Wonder is the Orcish War-Drum Citadel of the Red Gate.
The Beacon is the Great Forge Beacon.
The Seat of Power is the Ember Crack Mosaics Command Bastion.
The five districts are Heavy Industry / Foundry, Arcane / Alchemical Labs, Military Command, Underworld / Hidden Economy, and Prison / Containment.
provisionalCanon: Drakmor's highest civic virtue is force under discipline.
The central tension is institutional order versus the violence required to keep that order productive.
rejectedReads: Drakmor is only a battlefield or raid camp.
The underworld and containment systems are incidental rather than civic structures.
cautionFlags: Do not soften Drakmor into generic forge fantasy.
Do not make it stupid or chaotic; the brutality is organized.
Keep alchemy, command, black-market exchange, and containment distinct from heavy industry.

environment.environmentalLogic: Drakmor converts heat, smoke, iron, command routes, and controlled danger into infrastructure. The city feels survivable only because every hazard is assigned to a system.

skyline: Orcish War-Drum Citadel of the Red Gate as far wonder anchor
Ember Crack Mosaics Command Bastion as central seat of power
Great Forge Beacon as signal landmark rooted in heavy industry
Command Bastion and Containment Keep as secondary hard-power anchors
smoke stacks, red banners, blue lab lights, black towers, and molten channels defining the horizon

civilization.people: Citizens are orcish, forceful, rank-aware, production-minded, and used to civic systems that assume danger, containment, and command are normal parts of public life.
civilization.governance: Authority is command-industrial. Power flows from forge output, military rank, alchemical control, containment authority, and the ability to tolerate or punish hidden exchange.
civilization.religion: Religious expression is secondary to command ritual and war-drum civic ceremony; forge fire, red gate symbolism, and public musters carry much of the sacred-political weight.

streets.appearance: Hot, smoky, black-stone, and fortified: forge courts, blue lab windows, command stairs, red banners, market mud, vault doors, containment walls, and ember cracks.
streets.movement: Movement follows industrial causeways, command plazas, forge roads, black-market underways, lab corridors, and containment checkpoints.
streets.lighting: Forge orange and ember red dominate industry; blue alchemical lamps and cold containment light create sharp civic contrasts.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain turns soot into black runoff and makes forge glow stronger against wet stone; smoke reduces sightlines and makes command markers vital.
streets.dayCycle: Day is production, musters, lab movement, and open market traffic; evening shifts to understreet exchange and containment patrols.
streets.nightCycle: Night is red gate torchlight, blue lab windows, black-market lamps, forge glow, and cold prison corridors.

housing.wealthy: Command-adjacent black-stone residences, protected courtyards, red banners, private guard access, and blue-lit official rooms.
housing.middle: Forge-family blocks, workshop rooms, alchemy-adjacent apartments, soot-dark courtyards, and practical fortified doors.
housing.poor: Wet alley housing, market-edge rooms, labor barracks, understructure dwellings, and cramped quarters near smoke, mud, and work noise.

districts.name: Heavy Industry / Foundry
districts.civicPurpose: Production, labor organization, industrial alarm, and forge-based public identity.
districts.visualIdentity: Great Forge Beacon, smoke stacks, crucible halls, chains, slag brick, forge glow, and workers.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Controlled research, formula restriction, dangerous invention, and civic-magical production.
districts.visualIdentity: Alchemy Lab, blue lamps, formula archives, glass, sealed doors, and dark stone corridors.

districts.name: Military Command
districts.civicPurpose: Rank, musters, command law, mobilization, and disciplined force.
districts.visualIdentity: Command Bastion, standard towers, red banners, military plazas, and black stone.

districts.name: Underworld / Hidden Economy
districts.civicPurpose: Tolerated illegality, contraband, debts, shadow logistics, and informal survival networks.
districts.visualIdentity: Black Market Arcade, Understreet Vault, mist veils, coded stalls, wet alleys, and guarded doors.

districts.name: Prison / Containment
districts.civicPurpose: Incarceration, containment, judgment, discipline, and public fear of disorder.
districts.visualIdentity: Containment Keep, Judgment Yard, barred corridors, cold light, black walls, and guarded routes.

wonder.name: Orcish War-Drum Citadel of the Red Gate
wonder.symbolicRole: War rhythm, command, and public force made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Far citadel of red gate forms, drum massing, black stone, banners, and torchlight.
wonder.civicRole: Wonder-scale symbol of Drakmor’s command-industrial legitimacy.
storyHooks: A war-drum ceremony turns civic production toward crisis.

beacon.name: Great Forge Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Industrial output and emergency made public signal.
beacon.visualRole: Beacon rooted in forge district, rising through smoke, chains, and orange heat.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates forge crews, command officers, alchemists, market runners, and containment response.
storyHooks: A Beacon shift makes the factories stop at once.

seatOfPower.name: Ember Crack Mosaics Command Bastion
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Command authority built from controlled fracture and heat.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central command bastion with ember mosaics, standards, black stone, and military terraces.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Government center for production orders, military rank, containment policy, and official command.
storyHooks: A command order exposes a hidden dependency on the underworld.

majorLandmarks.name: Alchemy Lab
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Blue lamps, formula archives, sealed lab halls.
storyHooks: A formula archive contains a forbidden solution.

majorLandmarks.name: Command Bastion
storyHooks: A standard is raised for the wrong reason.

majorLandmarks.name: Black Market Arcade
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: The necessary shadow under official force.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Vault doors, coded stalls, mist, wet alleys.
storyHooks: A black-market route keeps the official city functioning.

majorLandmarks.name: Containment Keep
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Black walls, cold light, barred corridors, judgment yard.
storyHooks: A containment decision defines what the city fears most.

districtDioramaGuidance: Use black basalt, ember cracks, smoke, red banners, forge glow, blue alchemical lamps, command standards, and fortified geometry.
Each district must show institutional function: forge, lab, command, underworld, containment.
Do not make the city look improvised; it should be brutal but organized.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Show a massive orcish industrial fortress city with forge basins, smoke stacks, black towers, red banners, blue lab lights, containment walls, and the War-Drum Citadel of the Red Gate.
Great Forge Beacon and Command Bastion must be legible anchors.
